# Turning quantum potential into deployable technology.
Anyon Systems builds fully integrated, ready-to-use quantum computers designed for real-world environments. Originating in Canada, where it pioneered the country’s first universal gate-based systems, Anyon now delivers deployable quantum infrastructure to customers globally.
By combining advanced engineering, manufacturing discipline, and full-stack integration, the company enables organizations to move beyond experimentation and into practical quantum computing today.
![Qube™](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/cube.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
## Qube™
Qube™ is an all-in-one superconducting quantum computer designed to integrate seamlessly into existing HPC centres.
The Qube™ is a fully integrated, all-in-one superconducting quantum computer designed for seamless deployment in existing HPC environments. Its self-contained, modular architecture simplifies installation, operation, and servicing, while a user-friendly interface and low-maintenance cryogenic system ensure ease of use. Built for scalability, the platform can be upgraded with more advanced quantum processors over time, providing a practical, future-ready solution for organizations adopting quantum computing.
![Hudson](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/hudson_01.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
## Hudson
Hudson is an integrated quantum computing R&D platform for organizations developing, testing, and scaling superconducting quantum technologies.
Hudson is Anyon’s integrated quantum R&D platform, combining all essential infrastructure, including cryogenics, control systems, and electronics, into a single configurable solution for superconducting quantum development. Designed for flexibility and efficiency, it supports systems from 6 to 54 qubits, operates without liquid nitrogen, and features automated cycles to improve reliability and accelerate experimentation. Customizable to specific needs, Hudson enables organizations to develop, test, and scale quantum technologies with both standard or custom processors.
![Snowflurry™](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/snowflurry.png?v=cfc17f3)
## Snowflurry™
Snowflurry™ is an open-source software library for creating quantum circuits and running them on quantum computers and quantum simulators.
This platform enables end-to-end quantum circuit creation and experimentation, with seamless execution across both quantum hardware and high-performance simulators. Designed with a developer-friendly access layer, it supports efficient research workflows and integration into existing environments. The system is built to enable a wide range of applications, including education, performance benchmarking, algorithm development, and hybrid quantum-classical exploration, providing a practical and accessible foundation for advancing quantum computing use cases.
